sessions.title: Introduction & ANOVA
sessions.description: Kirk Chapters 1-3, ANOVA basics, mediation logic, and software syntax foundation.

sessions.title: CRD & One-Way ANOVA
sessions.description: CRD model setup, assumptions, HOV checks, transformations, and nonparametric alternatives.

sessions.title: Multiple Comparisons & Contrasts
sessions.description: Family-wise error control, Bonferroni Holm FDR, orthogonal contrasts, and pairwise logic.

sessions.title: Effect Size, Power, and Type I vs Type III
sessions.description: Interpret effect sizes, power planning, and understand Type I and Type III sum of squares.

sessions.title: Project 1 Methods Playbook
sessions.description: Mediation moderation serial mediation, GLM vs Gamma vs nonparametric, and threshold contrasts.

sessions.title: Exam 1 Mega Notes (Bilingual)
sessions.description: Printable, exam-style notes based on the 2025 Exam 1: T/F traps, ANOVA as regression, effect size, Tukey, contrasts, and power.
